message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Install Package Flow

participant "InstallInstalling" as II
participant "PackageInstaller" as PI
participant "PackageInstallerService" as PIS
participant "InstallingAsyncTask" as IAT
participant "PackageInstallerSession" as PISession
participant "Handler" as Handler
participant "mHandlerCallback" as Callback
participant "PkMS" as PkMS
participant "PkMS.PackageHandler" as PkMS_PH
participant "PkMS.HandlerParams" as PkMS_HP
participant "PkMS.InstallParams" as PkMS_IP

== Initialization ==
II -> II: onCreate()
activate II
II -> PI: createSession()
activate PI
PI -> PIS: createSession()
activate PIS
PIS --> PI: sessionId
deactivate PIS
PI --> II: sessionId
deactivate PI
II -> II: onResume()
activate II
II -> IAT: execute()
activate IAT

== Background Execution ==
IAT -> IAT: doInBackground()
activate IAT
IAT -> PI: openSession(sessionId)
activate PI
PI --> IAT: Session
deactivate PI
IAT -> PISession: openWrite()
activate PISession
PISession -> PISession: doPostExecute()
activate PISession
PISession -> PISession: commit()
activate PISession
PISession -> Handler: sendToTarget(MSG_COMMIT)
activate Handler
Handler -> Callback: handleMessage(MSG_COMMIT)
activate Callback
Callback --> PISession: handleCommit()
deactivate Callback
PISession -> PISession: commitNonStagedLocked()
activate PISession
PISession -> PISession: installStage()
activate PISession
PISession -> PkMS: sendMessage(INIT_COPY)
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS_PH: startCopy()
activate PkMS_PH
PkMS_PH -> PkMS_HP: handleStartCopy()
activate PkMS_HP
PkMS_HP -> PkMS_IP: handleReturnCode()
activate PkMS_IP
PkMS_IP --> PkMS_PH: 
deactivate PkMS_IP
PkMS_PH --> PkMS: processPendingInstall()
deactivate PkMS_PH
PkMS -> PkMS: processInstallRequestsAsync()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: installPackagesTracedLI()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: installPackagesLI()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: preparePackageLI()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: scanPackageTracedLI()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: commitPackagesLocked()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: commitReconciledScanResultLocked()
activate PkMS
PkMS -> PkMS: commitPackageSettings()
activate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PkMS
deactivate PISession
deactivate PISession
deactivate PISession
deactivate IAT
deactivate II

@enduml
```
